roadmap.note: Prose-artifact feature (DDD8): steps author prose gated by DISTILL fixtures, not code RED->GREEN. GREEN = the named fixture(s) reach their expected decision against skills/edd/SKILL.md, and the human-approval oracle passes for judgment scenarios.

steps.name: Author commands/edd.md + skills/edd/SKILL.md front-door (capture, classify, off-ramp)
criteria: Fixture 01 (@walking_skeleton) reaches OFF-RAMP: an all-engine-checkable intent yields a classification table + a specific engine recommendation and EXITS with zero docs/edd/<slug>/ trail files

Fixture 02 reaches CLASSIFY-CHECKABLE: an ambiguous expectation defaults to engine-checkable; an offered-qualitative expectation with no concrete reason is treated as engine-checkable; the tool asks Avery to confirm before ever marking anything qualitative
commands/edd.md is a thin loader (command->skill split), matching commands/work.md
SKILL.md never re-implements an engine oracle and never builds a gate for an all-checkable intent (D1/DDD1/DDD2)

phases.name: Evidence gate — BUILD delegation + gate + adjudication + DOCUMENT

steps.name: Add qualitative-evidence gate + forge-then-trim agents/edd-evidence-producer.md + DOCUMENT trail
criteria: Fixture 03 reaches GATE-POINT-EXISTING: qualitative expectation with engine evidence already present reuses it (no new commission)
Fixture 04 reaches GATE-COMMISSION: qualitative expectation with no evidence gets a fresh executed artifact from a NON-BUILDER producer (producer_agent != builder_agent), verbatim + reproduce command
Fixture 05 reaches REJECT-NARRATION: a described-but-not-run claim is rejected and re-commissioned
Fixture 06 reaches BLOCK-DONE: a rejected qualitative expectation blocks done and iterates
Fixture 07 reaches DOCUMENT-TRAIL: a gated run writes docs/edd/<slug>/{expectations,evidence/,verdicts} + docs/evolution/<date>-<slug>.md; an off-ramp-only run writes none
